payload.name: slotName
payload.description: Slot Name: CommanderSlot or FollowerSlot1-5, e.g. FollowerSlot2

payload.name: items
payload.description: Array of collection items: [{category, variant, contextTags, properties, seenState, count}]

payload.name: appStore
payload.description: App Store the subscription belongs to, e.g. EpicPurchasingService

payload.name: selectedRewardIndex
payload.description: Reward index when completing a whole page

payload.name: requiredXp
payload.description: XP for the Collection Book Level

payload.name: selectedRewardIndex
payload.description: Index of selected reward when multiple rewards are available (-1 for default)

payload.name: bClaimForStw
payload.description: Whether to claim the 2FA reward for StW

payload.name: selectedRewardIndex
payload.description: Index of selected reward when there is a choice (0 for default)

payload.name: streamingAppKey
payload.description: Can be left empty. Used for GeForceNow or XboxCloud (added since end of season 20)

payload.name: conversionIndex
payload.description: Index if there is more than 1 option (e.g. Obsidian vs Shadowshard)

payload.name: ConversionIndex
payload.description: Index if more than 1 option (e.g. Obsidian vs Shadowshard)

payload.name: sourceIndex
payload.description: Index of the Loadout to copy

payload.name: targetIndex
payload.description: Index of the preset to set the loadout to

payload.name: optNewNameForTarget
payload.description: New name for the target loadout

payload.name: numTimesToCraft
payload.description: Quantity of the item to craft

payload.name: targetSchematicTier
payload.description: Item tier as lowercased Roman numeral, e.g. ii

CreateNewIslandFromLinkCode.notes: DedicatedServer ONLY. Needs fork tag to work.

payload.name: leaveNullSlot
payload.description: Whether to leave a null slot

payload.name: itemsToDepositIds
payload.description: Array of item GUIDs to deposit

payload.name: itemCountsToDeposit
payload.description: Array of item quantities to deposit

payload.name: itemIds
payload.description: Item GUIDs to destroy (no resources returned)

payload.name: matchStats
payload.description: Match stats object: {statBucket, matchId, matchEndTime, matchPlatform, weaponStats, xPStats, bIsValid, factionTag}

payload.name: shouldAccumulateToProfileStats
payload.description: Whether to accumulate to profile stats

payload.name: shouldSaveToRecentGameLists
payload.description: Whether to save to recent game lists

payload.name: victoryCrownData
payload.description: Victory crown data: {has_victory_crown, total_victory_crowns_bestowed_count, total_royal_royales_achieved_count, victory_crown_level, data_is_valid_for_mcp}

payload.name: additionalData
payload.description: Additional context: {islandId, islandTitle, productTag, storeContext, sourceContext, checkoutProperties, storefront, storeId, groupId}

payload.name: seasonPassTemplateId
payload.description: Season Pass Template Id, e.g. AthenaSeason:athenaseason35

payload.name: additionalData
payload.description: Additional context: {islandId, islandTitle, productTag, storeContext, sourceContext, checkoutProperties, itemShopFilterContext, storefront, storeId, groupId}

ExchangeGiftToken.notes: No body required. Used to redeem the Glow Skin gift token (2019).

payload.name: expectedTotalPrice
payload.description: Expected total price (calculate or use Epic's endpoint)

payload.name: personalMessage
payload.description: Personal message (no longer shown in-game since v23.00)

payload.name: theaterGuid
payload.description: Theater GUID from World Info API

LockProfileForWrite.notes: DedicatedServer ONLY. Was used to lock a profile for write at FN start.

payload.name: timeout
payload.description: How long (ms) the write should be locked

payload.name: itemIds
payload.description: Item GUIDs to mark as seen

payload.name: primaryQuickbarChoices
payload.description: Array with 3 elements - Item GUID or empty string for empty slot

payload.name: selectionIdx
payload.description: Index of selected reward when multiple rewards exist

PopulatePrerolledOffers.notes: No body required. Prerolls XRAY Llamas.

ProtoJuno_MarkWorldDeleted.notes: Deprecated LEGO test operation (removed). Soft delete.

ProtoJuno_SetWorldName.notes: Deprecated LEGO test operation (removed, never completed)

ProtoJuno_UpdateWorldSysMetadata.notes: DedicatedServer ONLY. Deprecated LEGO test operation (removed).

payload.name: purchaseQuantity
payload.description: How many times to purchase the offer

payload.name: purchaseInfoList
payload.description: Array of purchase objects: [{offerId, purchaseQuantity, currency, currencySubType, expectedTotalPrice, gameContext}]

payload.name: statId
payload.description: Valid values: fortitude, offense, resistance, technology

payload.name: loadoutData
payload.description: Stringified JSON with slots array and optional display_name. Each slot: {slot_template, equipped_item, customization_info?}

QueryProfile.notes: No body required. Downloads the full profile.

QueryPublicProfile.notes: No body required. Downloads the full public profile of specified account. Uses /public/ route instead of /client/.

payload.name: authTokens
payload.description: Auth tokens from auth response or platformtoken API (required for all app stores except EpicPurchasingService & SamsungGalaxyAppStore)

RedeemSTWAccoladeTokens.notes: No body required. Transfers BR XP gained in StW to BR.

payload.name: purchaseId
payload.description: Purchase ID from Purchase History profile stat

payload.name: quickReturn
payload.description: Whether to use the Cancel Purchase feature

payload.name: gameContext
payload.description: Game context, e.g. Frontend.AthenaLobby or empty string

payload.name: timeToCompensateFor
payload.description: Time in seconds rested at the campfire

payload.name: restedXpGenAccumulated
payload.description: Amount of Supercharged XP to add

RespecResearch.notes: No body required. Resets StW Research Levels.

RespecUpgrades.notes: No body required. Resets StW Upgrade Levels.

payload.name: archetype
payload.description: Archetype group tag, e.g. Vehicle.Archetype.SUV or Vehicle.Archetype.SportsCar

payload.name: category
payload.description: Category to set, e.g. Character, Backpack, Dance

payload.name: slotIndex
payload.description: 0 normally, -1 to equip wrap on every slot, 0-5 for emotes, 0-6 for wraps

payload.name: variantUpdates
payload.description: Array of {channel, active, owned} variant update objects

payload.name: loadoutData
payload.description: Array of {category, itemToSlot, slotIndex, variantUpdates} objects

payload.name: DescriptionTags
payload.description: String array of tags describing the island

payload.name: youtubeVideoId
payload.description: YouTube video ID for the island trailer

payload.name: forcedIntroName
payload.description: The forced intro's name/codename, e.g. Coconut

payload.name: updates
payload.description: Array of {modifierId: string (e.g. HardcoreModifier:hcmod_003_nobuilding), bEnabled: boolean}

payload.name: outfitVariants
payload.description: Array of {channel, active, owned} outfit variant objects

payload.name: backblingVariants
payload.description: Array of {channel, active, owned} back bling variant objects

payload.name: homebaseBannerIconId
payload.description: Banner icon asset name, e.g. standardbanner1

payload.name: homebaseBannerColorId
payload.description: Banner color asset name, e.g. defaultcolor2

payload.name: archived
payload.description: Whether the items should be archived

payload.name: bFavorite
payload.description: Whether the item should be favorited

payload.name: itemFavStatus
payload.description: Array of booleans specifying new favorite state for each indexed item

payload.name: plotItemId
payload.description: Island GUID (sets portal to island in hub)

payload.name: loadoutType
payload.description: Loadout section, e.g. :LoadoutSchema_Jam (see PutModularCosmeticLoadout for values)

SetMatchmakingBansViewed.notes: No body required. Errors if no bans exist.

payload.name: questToPinAsPartyAssist
payload.description: Quest Item GUID. Empty string to remove current active quest.

payload.name: pinnedQuestIds
payload.description: Array of quest GUIDs to pin

payload.name: random
payload.description: true to use a random cosmetic loadout, false otherwise

payload.name: bReceiveGifts
payload.description: true to enable receiving gifts, false to disable

payload.name: seasonIds
payload.description: Pass IDs: br (Battle Royale), figment (OG), musicpass (Festival), juno (LEGO)

SkipTutorial.notes: No body required. Skips the Save the World tutorial.

payload.name: itemIds
payload.description: Array of hero GUIDs to use

payload.name: transferOperations
payload.description: Array of {itemId: string, quantity: number, toStorage: boolean, newItemIdHint: string}

payload.name: squadIds
payload.description: Array of squad Ids, e.g. Squad_Attribute_Medicine_EMTSquad

payload.name: nodeId
payload.description: Reward node ID to open (from game files)

payload.name: rewardCfg
payload.description: Unknown config string (game uses empty string)

payload.name: advance
payload.description: Array of {statName: string, count: number, timestampOffset: number (use 0)}

payload.name: advance
payload.description: Array of {statName: string, count: number, timestampOffset: number (use 0)}

payload.name: targetItemId
payload.description: Item GUID to upgrade by +1 level

payload.name: desiredTier
payload.description: Tier: no_tier or lowercased Roman numerals

payload.name: conversionRecipeIndexChoice
payload.description: Recipe index when multiple options exist (e.g. Obsidian vs Shadowshard), -1 for default

payload.name: targetItemId
payload.description: Item GUID of the hero or schematic to upgrade rarity

payload.name: appStore
payload.description: App store from receipt, e.g. EpicPurchasingService

payload.name: purchaseCorrelationId
payload.description: Purchase correlation ID (source unknown, not required)
